Weekly Mortgage Applications Survey for the Week Ending January 12, 2024

WASHINGTON, D.C. (January 17, 2024) — Mortgage applications decreased 10.7 percent from one week earlier, according to data from the Mortgage Bankers Association's (MBA) Weekly Mortgage Applications Survey for the week ending January 12, 2024.

Survey Component Index Pct. Change from Previous Week Pct. Change from One Year Ago
Market Composite Index (SA):221.3-2.3%5.1%
Market Composite Index (NSA):210.5-10.7%n.a.
Purchase Index (SA):147.21.5%3.2%
Purchase Index (NSA):133.8--2.8%
Refinance Index (SA):612.4-5.6%7.9%
Refinance Index (NSA):589.1-4.9%n.a.
